Ejecting Players

In extreme cases, the competition creator can eject a specific player or team from a competition. Ejected players are not allowed to check in for subsequent matches. A player scheduled to face off with an ejected opponent automatically advances to the next round.

To eject a player, your title calls the XOnlineCompetitionManageEntrant function and passes the value XONLINE_COMP_ACTION_EJECT in the dwAction parameter. Only the competition creator can eject a player.
